## What this PR does
A short description of the change. One or two sentences is fine.

## Why
What problem does this solve? Link any related issues (e.g., `Closes #42`).

## How tested
- [ ] Ran `pytest tests/` locally
- [ ] Manually verified the affected flow in the browser
- [ ] Checked `server.log` for unexpected errors
- [ ] Other: <describe>

## Checklist
- [ ] No real credentials, API keys, OAuth tokens, or `.spotify_cache` content committed
- [ ] No personal taste data (`TASTE_PROFILE.md`, `playlists.json`, `music_agent.db`) committed
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Changes do not break the first-launch / setup flow
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior or config changed

## Screenshots / output
If this changes the UI or visible output, include before/after screenshots or sample logs.
